description: Extract geometry and hydraulic simulation results from the HEC-RAS HDF5 output file `Muncie.p04.hdf` (located in `~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/`) and compile them into a summary table. Create a CSV file named `cross_section_summary.csv` in `~/Documents/hec_ras_results/` containing the following columns: `River_Station`, `Min_Ch_El_ft`, `Peak_WSE_ft`, `Max_Depth_ft` (calculated as Peak_WSE - Min_Ch_El), `Peak_Flow_cfs`, and `Peak_Vel_fps`. The table must include data for all cross-sections and be sorted by River Station in descending order.
